metadata.description: Systematic research ladder for Claude Code (L0→L5) — Firecrawl + Tavily + optional Codex cross-model channel.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Six composable research skills: /quick-research (L0, ~1 min), /research (L1, ~5 min), /deep-research (L2, ~12 min, 4 verification checkpoints), /expert-research (L3, ~20 min, critic agent + fact-check), /academic-research (L4, ~40 min, arXiv + full agent crew), /ultra-research (L5, 1+ hour, full knowledge vault). Each tier composes on the previous one. Includes shared verification library for audit-trail integrity.
